description: Increase your podcast audience and awareness with this cheerful rainbow template. This customizable template allows you to share photos, bios, episodes, ways to listen, social media links, and contact information. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: I am Héctor "Titus" Ruiz, a Peruvian designer based in the Canary Islands. I'm focused on Brand Identity Design and UI Design. I help companies build brands, discovering their true potential through a research-based design process, creating an impactful identity.
